title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapped path to $10M ARR without external funding. He covers strategies for reaching $1M ARR in 117 days, product-led growth, SEO, churn reduction, pricing experiments, and decision-making frameworks for founders.
